content: next-mdx-remote GitHub repo (hashicorp/next-mdx-remote) was archived by the owner on 2026-04-09 and is now read-only/unsupported. v6.0.0 (published 2026-02-12, the version CLAUDE.md locks) still works and has no known critical bugs, but receives no further fixes. Maintained fork next-mdx-remote-client v2.1.11 (peer react>=19.1.0) exists as a drop-in-ish alternative if issues arise later.
